generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our reliance on foreign tech is making us vulnerable? Just last month, a cyberattack on European power grids showed how dangerous this dependency is. We need to invest in our own strategic autonomy to protect our critical infrastructure. #NationalSecurity #TechIndependence
